title: The Cursed Smile [horror]
description: The Cursed Smile beta update makes The Smiler more stronger then ever now with new lore, new model, new entities, new ai, custom sounds, new structures, and more!
body:
## The Cursed Smile Beta Update is here! The Beta Update brings new sounds, new ai, new structures, new entities, a new model, and more. The Smiler is more powerful then ever now and with this beta update some of The Smile Man's stuff is in the mod which gives the mod some new lore of how the story will go. Now I'm too lazy to type a lot and I dont't want to spoil the update too much so all I will say is be careful at night now, you have no idea what can happen now with having The Cursed Smile in your world now. I do have more plans to bring new updates into the mod during beta before the release but the release update won't be for a while, and I mean a while, I want to relax, this update took 6 and a half months to do, so please support me so much if you can by checking out my youtube channel and other stuff.

Join My Discord Server For Updates and Leaks: [The SFBEXOTIC Community Discord Server](https://discord.gg/kTKDFsYdaG)

All Entities Below:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Noah Reed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbc6520a704f35cac9d5665992629e5d7e132c8_0.webp)
Noah Reed:
Noah Reed can spawn in the new Watchtower Structure with a Bloody Iron Axe and a Torch and he will not get mad at you if you take some of his stuff or hit him but don't kill him he is here to help you and take back this minecraft world from The Cursed Smile, and if your lucky you might even find some lore in the Watchtower to find out what really happened.

![The Dark Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4249b9b2f2b7e572b229f06f5c271d65d9c044f1_0.webp)
The Dark Villager:
A new type of villager profession in Minecraft that comes with the new beta update for The Cursed Smile and if you trade with him you can get some of The Smile Man's stuff and all I will say to trade with him is get The Corrupted Alter.

![The Shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09656c265b62815c1709e5872566950f3c95a62_0.webp)
The Shadow:
The Shadow is a new type of stalking entity that has a bad past and is now working with The Smiler do take over your Minecraft world but Noah Reed has yet to find out what happened and why The Shadow is here to help The Smiler. (more updates will come soon for The Shadow)

![The Smiler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf849239c78b8debc3b78f5ee7f522a54fa72d8_0.webp)
The Smiler:
The Smiler is here and even stronger and powerful, and will do anything to get his brother The Smile Man back alive and kill Noah Reed for what he did. The Smiler has a new model, new ai, custom sounds, and a lot more of new stuff, so I won't spoil too much but all I will say is be careful at night.

![The Smiler (stalking)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45f2e796b37a152e8b359874907faac61551966f_0.webp)
The Smiler [stalking]:
This version of The Smiler is the stalking form, which all he will do is stalk you and scare you.

![The Smiler (stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f53e6cdb8dcf1b2a77193e93a21f6ffbe8c544c3_0.webp)
The Smiler [stalker]:
This version of The Smiler is bit more complactied but the stalker version is better then the stalking version but this one may spook you more, maybe idrk.
</details>

All Structures Below:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Campsite Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af619916d82693a018aae1f2537b873d7c97a24a_0.webp)
Campsite Structure:
The Campsite Structure is just a campsite with a carrige with some haybales and a little tiny pond and its a nice campsite to just chill and relax and get some of The Smile Man's stuff.

![Watchtower Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/765648130a64178e205c134a7662b34d6e48b635_0.webp)
Watchtower Structure:
The Watchtower Structure is a structure that has where Noah Reed lives and has some hugh lore info about The Cursed Smile and The Smile Man.

![The Smile Man Ritual Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec07e74cd6d007a97d65f39b60a6d0dfa53fe60_0.webp)
The Smile Man Ritual Structure:
The Smile Man Ritual Structure is a structure that shows how The Smiler tired to summon and bring back The Smile Man to life with a trap.
</details>

![Geckolib Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc0ce2c1f88e368a18b7d0b08d7398f5b82bcea.png)
# GECKOLIB IS NEEDED FOR MOD TO WORK: [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
